allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('accepted:',d.get\('accepted'\),'category:',d.get\('category'\)\); [print\(' ',l,'verified_ok=',v.get\('verified_ok'\),'iters=',v.get\('iterations'\)\) for l,v in \(d.get\('languages'\) or {}\).items\(\)]; print\('error:',d.get\('error'\)\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from mo_validator.agent import Agent, DEFAULT_MODEL, DEFAULT_BASE_URL; print\('import OK'\); print\('model:', DEFAULT_MODEL\); print\('base_url:', DEFAULT_BASE_URL\)")
Bash(python -m py_compile mo_validator/prompts.py mo_validator/mlpipeline.py mo_validator/executor.py mo_validator/runners.py)
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import mo_validator.executor, mo_validator.mlpipeline, webapp.server; print\('imports OK'\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/process -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"description":"Given a set of distinct positive integers, return the largest subset such that every pair \(a,b\) satisfies a % b == 0 or b % a == 0. If multiple subsets of the maximum size exist, return any one. Input: first line n, then n integers. Output: the subset elements separated by spaces.","languages":["java"],"max_iterations":3}')
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import mo_validator.mlpipeline, mo_validator.prompts, mo_validator.executor; print\('imports OK'\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import mo_validator.mlpipeline, mo_validator.prompts, mo_validator.executor, webapp.server; print\('imports OK'\)")
Bash(sleep 1; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "server HTTP %{http_code}\\n" http://127.0.0.1:5000/ 2>&1 || echo "not up"; tail -3 /tmp/mo_serve.log 2>/dev/null)
